name: Ganesh C
title: Team Lead — Product Engineering · Solution Architect
summary: Engineering Team Lead and Solution Architect with 13+ years of experience building scalable Python backend systems, cloud-native platforms, and data pipelines. Currently leading a product engineering team at QWY Soft on QWQER, a hyperlocal delivery and logistics platform (DMS), with AWS ECS deployments and a GCP BigQuery analytics platform. Proven track record architecting event-driven systems and delivering solutions in fintech (PCI-DSS), IoT, and logistics domains.

highlights: Lead the engineering team on QWQER DMS — order lifecycle, rider dispatch, merchant/admin portals, and real-time tracking (Django, DRF, Celery, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ).
Architected order archive pipeline: PostgreSQL to S3 Parquet with AWS Glue/Athena; containerized PySpark ETL with idempotent daily incrementals and safety-gated purge.
Designed GCP analytics platform: Terraform Pub/Sub → BigQuery, Cloud Run alert service (FastAPI), Power BI–ready marts.
Manage Docker and AWS ECS deployments for API, Celery workers, and Daphne WebSocket services; GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Led geo/dispatch optimization and serverless rider notification scheduler (Lambda, EventBridge, DynamoDB, FCM).
Led an 8+ member team on TerraOne IoT platform backend; GitLab CI/CD for Flask microservices (Docker, MongoDB, Redis, Celery).
Delivered microservices web application with Angular frontend and Python backend.
Led backend for Connected Advisor Platform (CAP) with Keras/RetinaNet object detection on insurance documents.
Tech Lead on Dasgateway PSP integrated with PayVision, Bank One, Omnipay (Django, PostgreSQL).
Key role in PCI-DSS auditing for the payment platform.

experience.role: Senior Software Engineer / Associate Team Lead
highlights: Associate Team Lead for Delinkure — core banking NPA risk management software.
Developed core Django applications and contributed to an ERP system.
Developed PHP-based web applications for client projects.
